since_last: 47% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.38%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +0.34% · Gold +0.75% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 47% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.38%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.38%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.10%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NVT is the standout at +5.56%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +5.56%, LEU +3.58%, DLR +3.26%, TER +3.19%, ARM +3.01%. Laggards: BIDU -4.15%, NOW -2.03%, MGNI -1.96%, SAP -1.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.09% at $139.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
